description: Secure document and message exchange between firm and clients.

subdomains.name: client
subdomains.emergencyNote: Staff emergency access only — client magic-link flows require HTTPS cookies and won't work over the plain-HTTP emergency port.

optional.name: OIDC_ISSUER_URL
optional.doc: OIDC issuer URL for SSO. Set via 'sudo nano /opt/vibe/env/vibe-connect.env'.

optional.name: POSTMARK_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_SECRET
optional.doc: Inbound email webhook signing secret (Postmark).

optional.name: POSTFIX_RAW_BRIDGE_SECRET
optional.doc: Raw email bridge secret (self-hosted Postfix).

optional.name: CLAMD_HOST
optional.doc: ClamAV host for attachment scanning. Omit AND set ALLOW_UNSCANNED_UPLOADS=1 to skip scanning. Server refuses to start with neither set.

optional.name: CLAMD_PORT
optional.doc: ClamAV port. Default 3310.

optional.name: ALLOW_UNSCANNED_UPLOADS
optional.doc: Set to 1 to acknowledge shipping without AV scanning. Required if CLAMD_HOST is unset. Appliance default in env-templates/per-app/vibe-connect.env.tmpl.

optional.name: EMAIL_PROVIDER
optional.doc: Outbound email provider, used by Vibe-Connect for magic-link emails and notifications. The client portal is disabled until configured.

ui.label: Email provider
ui.helpText: Without email, Vibe-Connect's client portal is disabled. Pick a provider, fill the credentials, click Test, then Save.

optional.name: EMAIL_FROM
optional.doc: From address used for outbound email. Must be verified with the chosen provider.

ui.label: From address
ui.helpText: e.g. noreply@firm.com — must be verified with your email provider.

optional.name: RESEND_API_KEY
optional.doc: Resend API key. Visible at https://resend.com/api-keys.

optional.name: POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN
optional.doc: Postmark server token. Visible at https://account.postmarkapp.com under Servers → Credentials.

optional.name: EMAILIT_API_KEY
optional.doc: EmailIt API key. Visible at https://emailit.com under API keys.

optional.name: SMTP_HOST
optional.doc: SMTP server hostname (e.g. smtp.example.com).

optional.name: SMTP_PORT
optional.doc: SMTP port. 587 (STARTTLS) is most common; 465 for implicit TLS.

optional.name: SMTP_USER
optional.doc: SMTP authentication username.

optional.name: SMTP_PASSWORD
optional.doc: SMTP authentication password.

optional.name: SMS_PROVIDER
optional.doc: Outbound SMS provider for two-factor codes. Optional; magic-link email is the primary delivery path.

optional.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
optional.doc: Twilio auth token, paired with TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID below.

optional.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
optional.doc: Twilio Account SID (starts with AC...).

optional.name: TEXTLINK_API_URL
optional.doc: Base URL of the TextLink LAN appliance, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8080. Reachable from this host on LAN or Tailnet.

ui.label: TextLink API URL
ui.helpText: Base URL of your TextLink box (no trailing slash). Test runs a reachability probe; actual SMS sending happens from Vibe-Connect.

optional.name: TEXTLINK_API_KEY
optional.doc: API key issued by the TextLink LAN appliance. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

optional.name: BACKUP_DESTINATION_TYPE
optional.doc: Where Duplicati ships encrypted backups. Connect refuses new vault uploads after 30 days without a successful backup, so this is effectively required for production use.

ui.label: Backup destination
ui.helpText: Encrypted backups of /opt/vibe/data and /opt/vibe/env. Configure the destination here, then complete authentication inside the Duplicati UI on its own subdomain.

options.label: None (Vibe Connect blocks new vault uploads after 30 days)

optional.name: PRESIDIO_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD
optional.doc: Microsoft Presidio confidence threshold for PII redaction. Lower = more aggressive redaction; higher = fewer false positives.

ui.label: PII redaction confidence threshold
ui.helpText: 0.5–0.95. Tighter values redact less; loose values may redact non-PII text.

optional.name: STEP_UP_CODE_TTL_SECONDS
optional.doc: How long step-up auth codes (SMS/email 2FA) remain valid, in seconds.

ui.label: Step-up code TTL (seconds)
ui.helpText: 60–3600. Shorter is more secure; longer is more forgiving for slow inboxes.

firstLogin.note: Upstream ships dev-only seed users (kurt/alice/bob/carol with publicly-known passwords) that are NOT applied in appliance mode — only migrations run, not the yarn db:seed step. Visit /install for the first-run setup that creates your real admin account. If /install 404s on a fresh install, the upstream may not yet have wired the wizard for appliance deployments — file a bug.
